---
title: "Principles of Computer Graphics and Image Processing"
page-navigation: true
toc: false
---

# Student Work

## 2025

```{=html}
<div class="video-carousel">
  <button class="carousel-btn" id="pcg-2025-prev">&#10094;</button>
  <div class="carousel-video">
    <iframe id="pcg-2025-frame" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/Aq5WXmQQooo"
            height="420" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen></iframe>
    <div class="carousel-counter">
      <span id="pcg-2025-idx">1</span> / <span id="pcg-2025-total"></span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <button class="carousel-btn" id="pcg-2025-next">&#10095;</button>
</div>


<script>
(function() {
  var videos = [
    "Aq5WXmQQooo",
    "_e9yMqmXWo0"
  ];
  var i = 0;
  var frame   = document.getElementById("pcg-2025-frame");
  var idxEl   = document.getElementById("pcg-2025-idx");
  var totalEl = document.getElementById("pcg-2025-total");
  totalEl.textContent = videos.length;
  function show() {
    frame.src = "https://www.youtube.com/embed/" + videos[i];
    idxEl.textContent = i + 1;
  }
  document.getElementById("pcg-2025-prev").onclick = function() {
    i = (i - 1 + videos.length) % videos.length;
    show();
  };
  document.getElementById("pcg-2025-next").onclick = function() {
    i = (i + 1) % videos.length;
    show();
  };
})();
</script>
```
